features.feature_description: Central judgment/control layer managing pipeline orchestration
Domain execution layer for specialized task processing
Common infrastructure layer for storage, auth, logging
Persistence layer with SQLite/PostgreSQL/vector DB
Safety and policy enforcement layer
Standard pipeline: Perception, Reasoning, Action, Memory, Reflection
Each pipeline stage implements Runnable protocol
Minimal local-only core with basic pipeline
MVP with cloud LLM integration under 40K KRW/month
Server deployment with enhanced modules under 93K KRW/month
Enterprise with full module set under 266K KRW/month
Tech stack mapping per version (SQLite/Postgres, local/cloud LLM)
Structured event type namespace with domain.action pattern
Hierarchical failure code system for error categorization
YAML-based fallback strategy registry with trigger/action pairs
Central index of all data schemas used across modules
Module and component ID/naming conventions and conflict resolution
Per-version monthly cost ceiling enforcement
Module verification status badges (verified/partial/unverified)
Alert system for uncertain outputs with confidence thresholds
V0 required modules, configs, and validation items
V1 required modules, API keys, and cost setup
V2 server infra, DB migration, module activation
V3 enterprise modules and full feature activation
Maps each module ID to its implementation file path
Analyzes user intent, emotion detection, tone adaptation
Retrieval-augmented generation with evidence grounding
Conversation memory commit, search, export/import
Structured output formatting with templates
Decision object creation with plan modes
Output quality validation with P0/P1/P2 thresholds
Todo management and project tracking
Token cost tracking, prompt caching, batch processing
Context window compression and compaction
SSE/WebSocket streaming output management
Post-action reflection and learning
Dynamic plugin loading and lifecycle management
Task scheduling with cron-like triggers
Configuration loading, validation, hot-reload
Authentication and authorization management
Structured logging with LogEvent schema
Performance metrics collection and reporting
System health checking and status reporting
VamosError-based error handling and fallback dispatch
Multi-level caching (memory, disk, distributed)
Internal event pub/sub with EventType namespace
API rate limiting and quota management
Docker-based code execution sandboxing
Model Context Protocol client integration
Dynamic thinking level adjustment per query
Policy rule evaluation gate

Human approval workflow gate

Input/output safety content filtering

Standard module interface: run(input)->output, get_metadata(), health_check()
Docker container-based code execution with resource limits
Lightweight LLM for input preprocessing, safety filtering, domain hints
MCP as primary tool/context protocol for external integrations
Enum for adaptive thinking depth: NONE, BRIEF, MODERATE, DEEP, EXPERT
Configuration for dynamic thinking level with thresholds and token budgets
Result model capturing thinking level used, tokens consumed, reasoning
9-state FSM for pipeline lifecycle with transition rules
Queue-based request buffering with semaphore concurrency limiting
Lifecycle hook types: PRE_PROCESS, POST_PROCESS, ON_ERROR, ON_COMPLETE
Hook registration with type, callback, priority, and filter conditions
Hook execution result with modified data and continue/abort signal
Context compaction settings: max_tokens, strategy, preserve_recent
Compaction output: original/compacted token counts, preserved messages
Streaming config: protocol (SSE/WebSocket), chunk_size, flush_interval
Streaming event: type (token/tool_call/done/error), data, sequence_id
tiktoken-based accurate token counting for cost management
Target benchmarks: p95 latency, throughput, memory limits per version
Core Decision model: id, query, chosen_action, evidence, gates, confidence
One Decision object per pipeline run, immutable after creation
Pydantic v2 model_validate() at all pipeline boundaries for type safety
Structured error handling for LLM function calls with retry/fallback
Standard response wrapper: answer, evidence, self_check, decision_ref, audit
Evidence data model: source, content, relevance_score, citation
Structured log event catalog with ~30 predefined event types in YAML
Failure code catalog with ~20 classified error codes and severities
Fallback strategy catalog: model_downgrade, cache_serve, human_escalate
Intent analysis result: domain, action, entities, confidence, slots
EmotionCategory enum and EmotionScore model for user emotion analysis
Composite emotion frame with primary/secondary emotions and intensity
Response adaptation rules based on detected emotion state
Tone adaptation engine adjusting response style to user preference
Voice-based emotion detection config and result schemas (S7B-004)
Dynamic response length configuration based on query complexity
RAG evidence package: sources, chunks, scores, reranking results
Web search integration tool with provider abstraction
Web search result model: url, title, snippet, relevance_score
Config for grounding LLM responses with web search evidence
Citation config: style (APA/IEEE/inline), auto_cite, verify_urls
Citation data model: source_id, text, url, accessed_date, confidence
Memory commit request: conversation_id, messages, metadata, ttl
Export conversation history in JSON/Markdown format
Import conversation data with validation and dedup
Full-text and semantic search across conversation history
Auto-summarization of conversation threads with key points
Longitudinal emotion tracking and dashboard visualization
Structured output model: format, template, data, rendering_options
Plan mode for multi-step decision generation with dependency graphs
Routes multimodal inputs (text/image/audio) to appropriate processors
Locked self-check score thresholds: P0>=70, P1>=75, P2>=80
Task/todo management with priority, status, dependencies
Provider-specific prompt caching to reduce API costs
Cache config: provider, ttl, max_entries, eviction_policy
KV cache optimization: PagedAttention, MLA compression settings
KV cache metrics: hit_rate, memory_usage, eviction_count
Batch processing request: items, priority, timeout, callback_url
Batch processing result: completed, failed, partial results, timing
Five sequential gates: Policy, Cost, Evidence, Approval, SelfCheck
Policy rule evaluation gate checking business rules compliance
Cost threshold gate preventing budget overruns
Evidence sufficiency gate requiring minimum evidence score
Human-in-the-loop approval gate for high-risk decisions
Automated quality validation gate with score thresholds
Locked architectural decisions that cannot be changed without review
Optional signal fields: urgency, complexity, domain_hints
Verification chain tracking in decision audit
Per-gate result recording: pass/fail, score, reason, timestamp
S-module routing hints in Decision for gate orchestration
REST API for querying decision audit history with filters
Automatic LLM provider failover with health-based routing
Unified tool registry merging MCP tools and native functions
OpenAI: GPT-4o, assistants, vision, TTS, whisper, embeddings
Claude: extended thinking, tool_use, vision, PDF, batch

Llama 3, Code Llama, fine-tuning integration

Dependency injection kernel with interface bindings
Think-Execute-Evaluate iterative loop for complex reasoning
Event-driven automation: trigger conditions -> action execution
Quality gate framework with configurable pass/fail criteria
Extended IntentFrame with cryptographic signature for audit
L1-unit, L2-integration, L3-system, L4-production eval levels
LM-Eval harness for standardized LLM benchmarking
Automated gate evaluation with configurable rules and thresholds
Extended pipeline FSM with S-ERR state and per-state timeouts

Minimum required fields for UI rendering: answer, confidence, sources

Multi-agent coordination for distributed task execution

Production monitoring with alerting and SLO tracking

Cross-domain transfer learning between BLUE NODEs
